data.title: CNOOC Limited Achieves Strong Start with Dual Growth in Production and Performance in Q1 2026
data.description: CNOOC Limited revealed its operational performance for Q1 2026, with the company showing growth in both reserve and production. Listed as the Company with stock codes SEHK: 00883 (HKD) and 80883 (RMB) and SSE: 600938, CNOOC maintained its focus on efficiency and expansion during this period.

data.title: ANTA PG7 3.0 Launches Globally, Deepening Community Engagement Through "ANTA PG7 Cushion Evolution"
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Los Angeles, a leading footwear company unveiled a significant advancement targeting everyday runners. Two years prior, in 2024, ANTA launched the innovative PG7 midsole technology. This platform incorporates a unique cushioning material known as thermoplastic elastomers, delivering unprecedented performance. By addressing the essential requirements of runners, ANTA's PG7 surpasses the constraints of conventional...

data.title: Silobreaker Included in The External Threat Intelligence Service Providers Landscape, Q1 2026
data.description: Silobreaker, a leading technology company specializing in security and threat intelligence, has been recognized in Forrester's External Threat Intelligence Service Providers Landscape, Q1 2026. This report highlights 34 providers in the external threat intelligence market. As organizations face growing complexity and interconnectivity in risk environments, their attention towards advanced intelligence solutions is escalating. Silobreaker's inclusion in this report underscores its significance in supporting intelligence consumers, risk teams, security leaders, and analyst teams.

data.title: Trusted Voices and Smart Creative Redefine Audio’s Role in Driving Brand Outcomes
data.description: A recent study conducted by Omnicom Media Intelligence and iHeartMedia has revealed that audio advertising is proving to be effective in enhancing awareness, trust, and conversion rates. The research, titled "Turning Volume into Value: What New Audio Innovations Mean for Advertisers," highlights how advancements in format and creativity are driving consumer engagement and prompting action. The study, based on controlled experiments, shows that audio ads are delivering tangible improvements in key metrics, showcasing the impact of innovative strategies in the industry.

data.title: Graduates adapt career goals for initial jobs, exploring new fields for 1st positions in pursuit of success.
data.description: Many young individuals are exploring career paths they hadn't previously considered in order to establish themselves in the job market.

data.title: New Fed Chair Powell likely to maintain current interest rates at his final meeting; No immediate rate cuts expected.
data.description: This week, it is anticipated that the Federal Reserve will maintain interest rates at their current level. Jerome H. Powell is overseeing this meeting, which is expected to be his final one as chair.

data.title: Global demand for natural gas is high, but US exports remain limited due to Iran conflict causing shortage.
data.description: The leading worldwide provider of liquefied natural gas is unable to compensate for the deficit caused by the conflict in Iran, which has disrupted a significant source of supply.

data.title: Elon Musk's lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI highlights tech greed in Silicon Valley.
data.description: Elon Musk has filed a lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI, alleging that Silicon Valley's predominant characteristic is excessive greed. The legal action highlights the prevalence of this issue within the tech industry.

data.title: Niutech to Present Intelligent Continuous Pyrolysis Technology for European Circular Economy Closed-Loop at IFAT Munich 2026
data.description: The 2026 IFAT Munich International Environmental Technology Fair, a significant global event for waste management, resource recovery, and environmental technology, is scheduled to be held in Germany from May 4 to 7. This fair is a crucial platform for showcasing the latest innovations and solutions in these areas.

data.title: onsemi and Geely Expand Strategic Collaboration to Elevate the Driving Experience
data.description: onsemi's advanced EliteSiC power technologies have been incorporated into vehicles constructed on Geely’s cutting-edge SEA-S architecture. These technologies are specifically designed to enable the development of high-performance electric vehicles operating at 900 volts, representing the next generation of electric vehicles.

data.title: The recording of Artea Bank Investor Conference Webinar of introducing the Financial Results for 3M 2026
data.description: In a recent Investor Conference Webinar led by Vytautas Sinius, CEO, Tomas Varenbergas, CFO, and Tautvydas Mėdžius, Strategy Partner, the Bank showcased its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025. They also discussed new developments within the company and engaged in a Q&A session with participants following the presentation. Key details pertaining to revenue, profits, and strategic initiatives were shared during the webinar, highlighting the Bank's progress and future outlook.
